backend.auth: OAuth2 (provider-agnostic) + JWT access tokens with refresh token rotation

mobile.sync: Offline queue with retries; batch sync

infrastructure.runtime: Container service (AWS ECS Fargate or GCP Cloud Run)
infrastructure.secrets: AWS Secrets Manager / GCP Secret Manager

stack_choice.reasoning: Conservative, ergonomic stack; strong TypeScript tooling, Postgres reliability, Redis for dedupe/queues, native mobile clients as requested.

services.name: api-service
responsibilities: Auth endpoints (refresh flow) and JWT verification
Users + Privacy Manager APIs and policies (quiet hours, consent)
Token awards on floor, deterministic rewards logic
Multi-device handling: heartbeat, concurrent session warnings

services.name: worker-service
responsibilities: Nightly EMA floor evaluation and floor_history logging
Reward unlock triggers and token bucket maintenance
Heartbeat cleanup: mark sessions inactive after >5m idle

services.name: privacy-manager
responsibilities: Ensure proofs are optional; never persist images or hashes server-side
Enforce quiet hours policy at API edges

services.name: session-engine
responsibilities: DND request flag to clients at session start

services.name: mobile-ios-app
services.notes: Implements local-first queue, DND enable prompt on start, quiet hours enforcement, onboarding → first trial session

services.name: mobile-android-app
services.notes: Implements local-first queue, DND enable prompt on start, quiet hours enforcement, onboarding → first trial session

folder_scaffold.purpose: Config schema with Zod; loads env

cloud.networking: VPC with private subnets for Postgres/Redis; public for load balancer
cloud.db: Managed Postgres (RDS/Cloud SQL), automated backups, PITR
cloud.compute: ECS Fargate or Cloud Run; min instances=0/1 for cost
cloud.secrets: Secret Manager; inject via task env
cloud.storage: Object storage bucket for static assets (no user photo proofs)
security: Security groups restricting DB/Redis to services
Rotate JWT secret/keys; refresh token hashing
cloud.ci_cd: GitHub Actions → build/test → push image → deploy via IaC

db_tables.name: helpers_triggers
users
db_tables.ddl:
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pgcrypto;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email TEXT UNIQUE,
  display_name TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  quiet_hours_start TIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '22:00',
  quiet_hours_end TIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '07:00',
  privacy_default_deny BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  proofs_opt_in BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  proofs_retention_hours INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 24,
  encryption_public_key TEXT,
  signing_public_key TEXT
);
CREATE TRIGGER users_set_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON users
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION
  tg__set_updated_at();

db_tables.name: habits
sessions
session_events
token_buckets
floor_history
refresh_tokens

api_routes.summary: Exchange refresh token for new access token (rotation)
api_routes.security: None (uses HTTP-only refresh cookie or body token)

api_routes.summary: Current user profile and privacy settings
Update habit fields (activate/deactivate, timings, proof mode)
EMA-based floor adjustment proposal with effective_date
Start a session; server timestamps canonical; DND request flag included
Mark floor reached; deterministic token award with capacity
Complete session; returns summary with score impact
Accept offline queued events; return per-event results; idempotent dedupe

patch_files.summary: Dependencies: express, zod, jsonwebtoken, typeorm, pg, reflect-metadata, bullmq, pino; dev: ts-node, typescript, jest, ts-jest, supertest
TS config targeting ES2020, strict true, moduleResolution node, emitDecoratorMetadata
Create Express app, register JSON parser, auth and privacy middleware, mount routers for auth, users, habits, sessions, sync
Start HTTP server, connect TypeORM DataSource, handle graceful shutdown
Zod-validated env vars: PORT, DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, JWT_SECRET, REFRESH_TOKEN_TTL, QUIET_HOURS_DEFAULTS
Verify JWT, attach user to request; bypass for refresh endpoint
Enforce quiet hours (no nudges), deny-by-default guard rails
POST /auth/refresh implementation with rotation + token hashing
GET /users/me returns profile and privacy settings
POST/GET/PATCH habits with active limit enforcement and validation
POST start, floor_reached, complete; GET by id; server-side timestamps
POST /sync/batch handling idempotent events and conflict resolution
Pure functions for state transitions and token award, emitting session_events
Token bucket debit/credit with capacity; transaction logging
EMA computation, thresholds, cooldowns; writes floor_history
Helpers for idempotency keys and conflict merge policies
Initialize TypeORM DataSource with PostgreSQL URL and entities
Entity classes for Users, Habit, Session, SessionEvent, TokenBucket, TokenTransaction, FloorHistory, RefreshToken
Create enums, tables, triggers matching DDL snippets (helpers_triggers created first)
Multi-stage build for Node server, run as non-root
Services for postgres, redis, api; healthchecks and volumes
Providers, remote state, modules for vpc, db, cache, services
Full OpenAPI spec matching api_routes; used for client generation
SwiftUI app plan: onboarding, timer, offline queue, DND prompt
Kotlin app plan: onboarding, timer, offline queue, DND prompt

sleep-protection: quiet hours defaults in users table
ema-floor: caps at 80% target, cooldowns in worker logic
nudging-heat: policy hooks for heat gating and quiet hours
onboarding-first-run: mobile READMEs scope avatar, quiet hours, try-now 60s session
multi-device: heartbeat handling, concurrent session warning via API

constraints_enforced: privacy-first: no proof data stored; deny-by-default
passive_defaults: nudges gated and quiet-hours aware
sleep_protection + bedtime_hard_constraint: quiet hours persisted and used in policy
local_processing_by_default: mobile apps store proofs only locally
proofs_optional + short_retention_proofs_<=72h: opt-in flags, retention hours client hint
predictable_adjustments + reversible_changes_weekly_review: EMA logic constraints + floor_history for review
no_paid_advantages_affect_score: rewards logic has no monetization hooks
